name: Chinese-Style Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 lb Boneless top sirloin (trimmed of fat)
1 lb Fresh broccoli (trimmed, cut into 1-inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak diagonally across the grain into thin slices.
2. In a medium bowl, mix together the ginger, sugar, soy sauce, and cornstarch.
3. Add the meat strips and toss to mix well. Let stand for 5 to 10 minutes.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a 10-inch skillet over high heat until hot.
5. Add the meat mixture to the skillet. Cook, stirring, over high heat, until the meat loses its redness, about 5 minutes.
6. Remove the meat to a plate.
7. Add water, rice, and broccoli to the skillet. Bring to boiling.
8. Reduce the heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer for 5 to 6 minutes, or until the broccoli is tender.
9. Return the meat to the skillet and bring to boiling, stirring often.
10. Reduce the heat and simmer, stirring, for 1 minute.
